subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Verily, this Thy servant, penitent, beloved, noble, devout, pure, the man of wisdom who hath raised his call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک المنیب الحبیب النجیب التقی النقی الرجل الرشید الذی نادی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for martyrs, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
